name: generate_daily_tasks
description: Generate a structured daily task plan for a student based on their weakness profile and parent configuration constraints. Returns a list of tasks (REVIEW/PRACTICE/EXPLANATION) prioritized by severity and trend.

errorCount.description: Total error count for this KP

weakPoints.description: Student's weak knowledge points with severity and trend data

maxTasks.description: Maximum number of tasks to generate (from ParentStudentConfig.maxDailyTasks)
